name: GT-eps-assoc
source: Kitaev arXiv:2405.02434, refs/kitaev-2405.02434/approximate_algebras.tex:2229-2231 (the eps-associativity axiom for eps=O(eta), established in the proof of th_almost_idemp), VERBATIM: "\|(X\star Y)\star Z-X\star (Y\star Z)\| \le O(\eta)\ts\|X\|\ts\|Y\|\ts\|Z\|." This is ax_assoc (def-eps-cstar-algebra) for B with eps=O(eta): for all X,Y,Z in B, the associator (X*Y)*Z-X*(Y*Z) has norm <= C eta ||X|| ||Y|| ||Z||, C universal dimension-free. (The line just above, :2228, states this is the eps-associativity axiom for eps=O(eta).)
